title: BM: Hot Air Balloons
description: Adds Hot Air Balloons high up in the sky!
body:
[![](https://i.imgur.com/I6cOsx3.png)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/cp/projects/beyondmines.net)

Beyond Mines: Hot Air Balloons is a Datapack that adds different hot air balloons as custom overworld structures. These balloons appear high in the sky and contain loot that fits the vanilla balance. The datapack is part of the BM: Exosphere modpack series. Currently there are 6 different color variations, and 3 additional rare biome-specific variants with better loot(Cherry Grove, Desert, Ice).

The Datapack has 3 different loot tables:

*   payload (the main chest inside the basket)
*   payload\_rare (better loot for the 3 rare air balloons)
*   barrels (4 slightly hidden barrels on top of the basket

![](https://i.imgur.com/y9Mjb75.png)

Credits for the initial structure design:

Trydar

*   Trydar on Youtube: [https://www.youtube.com/trydar9k](https://www.youtube.com/trydar9k)
*   Trydar on Instagram: [https://www.instagram.com/trydar9k](https://www.instagram.com/trydar9k)
*   Trydar on Twitter: [https://twitter.com/trydar9k](https://twitter.com/trydar9k)

BM modpacks (soon on Modrinth too!):

*   [BM: Exosphere](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/bm-exosphere)
*   [BM: Exosphere Lite](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/bm-exosphere-lite)
*   [BM: Exosphere Community Edition](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/bm-exosphere-community-edition)
*   [BM: Revelations II](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/bm-revelations-2)

Usage in other modpacks is permitted when using a datapack loader, such as [Global Packs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/drp-global-datapack)
